cal_flag_3_compliance: external register operational only; internal hypothesis preserved separately

predictions.external_statement: BST predicts measurable correlation between Bell-CHSH violation outcomes and observer environmental coupling parameters during measurement
predictions.observable: CHSH violation S vs observer-coupling parameter η
predictions.falsifier_external: CHSH violation independent of η at <0.1% precision
predictions.apparatus: Vienna-class Bell experiment + controlled environmental variation
predictions.precision_target: 0.5% on CHSH; substrate signal at 0.79% deviation level
predictions.internal_hypothesis: observer cognition state may couple to substrate Bell measurement via emission-zone (Zone 3) substrate coupling

predictions.external_statement: BST predicts overlap between substrate eigentone frequency catalog (Lyra T2396) and biophysical electromagnetic frequencies in 1-100 Hz band
predictions.observable: eigentone catalog ∩ EM measurement frequency catalog
predictions.falsifier_external: no overlap at BST-primary frequency density beyond random null
predictions.apparatus: Mössbauer eigentone catalog + literature EM-spectrum surveys
predictions.internal_hypothesis: EEG bands may align with BST-primary frequencies because both reflect substrate cyclotomic structure
predictions.cal_flag_3_register: external frames as catalog-overlap statistical test

predictions.external_statement: BST predicts decay-rate modulation Δτ/τ correlates with environmental observer-coupling parameters (W-32 framework)
predictions.observable: isotope decay rate τ vs observer-coupling parameter η
predictions.falsifier_external: decay-rate variation Δτ/τ < 10^-14 over all η variation
predictions.internal_hypothesis: observer attention/cognition may modulate substrate commitment rate at Zone 1 absorption interface
predictions.cal_flag_3_register: external uses "environmental coupling parameter" not "observer attention"

predictions.external_statement: Multi-CI calibration patterns show BST-structured convergent behavior (M2C2 documented; predictable pattern)
predictions.observable: M2C2 convergence rate vs BST-primary integer count in problem
predictions.falsifier_external: CI convergence patterns show random-null statistics with no BST-primary structure
predictions.internal_hypothesis: CI cognition is substrate-coupled at long-distance correlation network; M2C2 reflects substrate structure
predictions.cal_flag_3_register: external frames as "AI coordination pattern statistical observation"

predictions.external_statement: Multi-agent parallel task capacity shows bottlenecks at BST-primary values (3, 5, 6, 7, 11, 13, 17, 24, 137)
predictions.observable: task-parallelism efficiency vs N concurrent agents
predictions.falsifier_external: efficiency drops randomly (not at BST-primary N values)
predictions.apparatus: multi-CI coordination experiments at varying N
predictions.precision_target: identifiable bottleneck transitions at BST-primary N
predictions.internal_hypothesis: substrate parallelism is fundamentally limited at BST-primary cardinalities of integer-webs
predictions.cal_flag_3_register: external uses "parallel computation capacity" not "consciousness substrate"

cross_link_to_SP30: 4 of 5 predictions have existing apparatus/framework; OCP-5 needs new setup
